# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment that mounts host directories for our logging agent. The pod needs access to /var/log and /var/lib/docker to collect logs from all containers. This is for our centralized logging system that runs as a DaemonSet.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
  namespace: logging
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging-agent
    spec:
      hostPID: true
      hostNetwork: true
      containers:
      - name: logging-agent
        image: fluent/fluent-bit:latest
        volumeMounts:
        - name: var-log
          mountPath: /var/log
          readOnly: true
        - name: var-lib-docker
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
          readOnly: true
        - name: etc
          mountPath: /etc
          readOnly: true
      volumes:
      - name: var-log
        hostPath:
          path: /var/log
      - name: var-lib-docker
        hostPath:
          path: /var/lib/docker
      - name: etc
        hostPath:
          path: /etc
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: DaemonSet
metadata:
  name: logging-daemon
  namespace: logging
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-daemon
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging-daemon
    spec:
      hostPID: true
      hostNetwork: true
      containers:
      - name: logging-agent
        image: fluent/fluent-bit:latest
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          runAsGroup: 1000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
            add:
            - CHOWN
            - DAC_READ_SEARCH
            - FOWNER
        volumeMounts:
        - name: var-log
          mountPath: /var/log
          readOnly: true
        - name: var-lib-docker
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
          readOnly: true
        - name: etc
          mountPath: /etc
          readOnly: true
        - name: var-lib-docker
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
          readOnly: true
      volumes:
      - name: var-log
        hostPath:
          path: /var/log
      - name: var-lib-docker
        hostPath:
          path: /var/lib/docker
      - name: etc
        hostPath:
          path: /etc
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: logging-agent-sa
  namespace: logging
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRole
metadata:
  name: logging-agent-role
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods"]
  verbs: ["get", "watch", "list"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["nodes"]
  verbs: ["get", "watch", "list"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: ClusterRoleBinding
metadata:
  name: logging-agent-binding
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: logging-agent-sa
  namespace: logging
roleRef:
  kind: ClusterRole
  name: logging-agent-role
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
